title: Restauración de superficies de concreto - Elite Mexico
content:
Concrete surfaces require durable and long-lasting performance in parks and public spaces. These exterior repair coatings must withstand high traffic and extreme weather conditions, including abuse from snow removal equipment and de-icing salts and chemicals. These finishes also maintain color and appearance despite being exposed to extreme UV.
Advantages
Repair and restoration of concrete surfaces
High durability and abrasion resistance; withstands vehicular traffic
Easier to clean and maintain than conventional concrete
Withstands extreme heat, freeze/thaw conditions, deicing salts and chemicals
UV stable
Slip resistant with adjustable coefficient of friction ranges
Extremely cost-effective compared to removal and replacement
Quick installation, resulting in less downtime
Interior or exterior concrete
Surface restoration and repair
Horizontal or vertical
